Glaze Library

Commercial Vendors

Vendor index for faux atmospheric electric glazes.

Browse the current commercial glaze vendors in the archive, grouped by brand and linked to the individual product records.

Vendor

AMACO

3 productsCone 5-6reduction-lookcopper redhistoric glaze referencesmovementtraditional-japaneselayerable

Potters Choice

AMACO PC-70 Copper Red

A Potters Choice copper red that promises traditional reduction-copper results in oxidation, breaking clear where thin.

Potters Choice

AMACO Potters Choice

A broad commercial line explicitly positioned for reduction-like effects in oxidation with strong layering potential at cone 5-6.

Shino

AMACO Shino

A commercial Shino line aimed at heavy iron reduction looks in oxidation, suitable for red or white clay and layerable with Potters Choice.

Vendor

Coyote Clay and Color

3 productsCone 6dramatic interactioncolor pullingslow-cool sensitivereduction-looklocal reductionoxblood

Archies Series

Coyote Archies Base

A runny commercial glaze that is relatively quiet on its own but becomes highly atmospheric when layered, especially with slow cooling.

Copper and Iron Glazes

Coyote Oxblood

A cone 6 commercial glaze engineered to create a true copper red in an electric kiln through local reduction chemistry.

Shino Glazes

Coyote Shino

A cone 6 commercial shino marketed as giving a gas-fired look in any kiln, with brown breaking over texture and good layering behavior.

Vendor

Laguna Clay & Glaze Co.

1 productsCone 10salt-lookcatalog-verified

WC Dry Glazes

Laguna WC-559 Artificial Salt

A current official Laguna catalog entry sold explicitly as Artificial Salt. The live page confirms title, SKU, imagery, and SDS access, but provides little descriptive copy about the fired surface.

Vendor

Mayco

5 productsCone 6, Cone 6-10reduction-lookoil-spotthickness-responsivebrown-breakcream-over-brownperiwinkle float

Stoneware

Mayco SW-111 Wrought Iron

A cone 6 oxidation glaze that mimics high-fire oil-spot surfaces with a dappled black gloss-matte finish at just two coats.

Stoneware

Mayco SW-122 Maycoshino

A commercial iron glaze that shifts from rich brown to creamier shino-like color as thickness increases.

Stoneware

Mayco SW218 Micro Ash

A fluid commercial glaze that can read like a modern ash surface, with charcoal depth, periwinkle float, and micro-crystalline bloom.

Stoneware Crystal Glaze

Mayco SW-118 Sea Salt

A white matte crystal glaze that blooms sage-to-mint green as the crystals melt, producing a foamy textured surface that reads closer to soda or salt accretion than a flat studio matte.

Stoneware Matte

Mayco SW-187 Himalayan Salt

A soft matte glaze with light pink and burnt-orange mottling that pools glossy clear at cone 6, giving a flashed salt- or soda-adjacent read when used with enough texture and thickness contrast.
